input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.3.14.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.3.14.2
            TITLE: adjustments from the cost audit will be included in the final scores

            CONTENT:
            rule S.3.14.2: Adjustments from the Cost Audit will be included in the final scores
S.3.14.2 Adjustments from the Cost Audit will be included in the final scores

final_answer: Adjustments from the Cost Audit will be included in the final scores
